texto: Sometimes I’m terrified of my heart
autor: of its constant hunger for whatever it is it wants. The way it stops and starts.
explicacao: Citação de of its constant hunger for whatever it is it wants. The way it stops and starts. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Sometimes I’m terrified of my heart” articula reflexao, poe, sometimes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
